The buildstac package provides functions to generate STAC catalogs.

# Package index

## Create STAC Objects

Functions for constructing the core STAC object types.

- [`stac_catalog()`](stac_catalog.md) : Create a STAC Catalog
- [`stac_collection()`](stac_collection.md) : Create a STAC Collection
- [`stac_item()`](stac_item.md) : Create a STAC Item
- [`stac_asset()`](stac_asset.md) : Create a STAC Asset
- [`stac_extent()`](stac_extent.md) : Create a STAC Extent Object
- [`stac_provider()`](stac_provider.md) : Create a STAC Provider Object
- [`stac_summaries()`](stac_summaries.md) : Create STAC Summaries

## Build Catalog Hierarchy

Add and retrieve children and items within a catalog or collection.

- [`add_child()`](add_child.md) : Add a child catalog or collection
- [`add_item()`](add_item.md) : Add an Item to a STAC Catalog or
  Collection
- [`remove_item()`](remove_item.md) : Remove Items from a STAC Catalog
  or Collection
- [`get_children()`](get_children.md) : Get Stored Children from Catalog
- [`get_items()`](get_items.md) : Get Stored Items from Catalog or
  Collection
- [`count_items()`](count_items.md) : Count Items in a STAC Catalog or
  Collection

## Manage Assets

Add assets to STAC Items.

- [`add_asset()`](add_asset.md) : Add an Asset to a STAC Item

## Manage Links

Add and query links on any STAC object.

- [`add_link()`](add_link.md) : Add a link to a STAC catalog
- [`add_self_link()`](add_self_link.md) : Add a self link to a STAC
  catalog
- [`add_root_link()`](add_root_link.md) : Add a root link to a STAC
  catalog
- [`add_parent_link()`](add_parent_link.md) : Add a parent link to a
  STAC catalog
- [`get_item_links()`](get_item_links.md) : Get All Item Links from a
  STAC Catalog or Collection

## Read and Write

Write complete catalog trees to disk and read them back.

- [`write_stac()`](write_stac.md) : Write a STAC Catalog Structure to
  Disk
- [`read_stac()`](read_stac.md) : Read a STAC Catalog from Disk
- [`write_catalog()`](write_catalog.md) : Write a Single STAC Catalog or
  Collection File
- [`write_item()`](write_item.md) : Write a Single STAC Item File

## EO Extension

Support for the Electro-Optical (EO) STAC extension.

- [`add_eo_extension()`](add_eo_extension.md) : Add EO Extension to a
  STAC Item
- [`eo_band()`](eo_band.md) : Create an EO Band Object
- [`landsat_oli_bands()`](landsat_oli_bands.md) : Create Standard
  Landsat 8/9 OLI Bands
- [`sentinel2_msi_bands()`](sentinel2_msi_bands.md) : Create Standard
  Sentinel-2 MSI Bands
- [`print(`*`<eo_band>`*`)`](print.eo_band.md) : Print method for EO
  band objects

## Raster Extension

Support for the Raster STAC extension and band-level metadata.

- [`add_raster_extension()`](add_raster_extension.md) : Add Raster
  Extension to a STAC Item or Asset
- [`raster_band()`](raster_band.md) : Create a Raster Band Object
- [`raster_statistics()`](raster_statistics.md) : Create Raster
  Statistics Object
- [`raster_histogram()`](raster_histogram.md) : Create Raster Histogram
  Object
- [`raster_from_file()`](raster_from_file.md) : Extract Raster Metadata
  from File
- [`bands_from_stars()`](bands_from_stars.md) : Extract Raster Band
  Metadata from a Stars Object
- [`print(`*`<raster_band>`*`)`](print.raster_band.md) : Print method
  for raster band objects

## Integration Helpers

Create STAC Items from spatial objects and files.

- [`item_from_raster()`](item_from_raster.md) : Create a STAC Item from
  a Stars Object
- [`item_from_sf()`](item_from_sf.md) : Create a STAC Item from an sf
  Object
- [`items_from_directory()`](items_from_directory.md) : Batch Create
  Items from Raster Files
- [`geometry_from_sf()`](geometry_from_sf.md) : Convert sf Geometry to
  GeoJSON
- [`bbox_from_sf()`](bbox_from_sf.md) : Calculate Bounding Box from sf
  Object
- [`extent_from_items()`](extent_from_items.md) : Create Collection
  Extent from Multiple Items

## Validation

Validate STAC objects against the specification.

- [`validate_stac()`](validate_stac.md) : Validate a STAC Object
